translations.app.name: CodexSwitch
translations.codexSessions.title: Codex sessions
translations.codexSessions.description: Codex filters the session list by the model_provider stored in session metadata; migrating moves older sessions under the CodexSwitch-managed provider.
translations.codexSessions.currentProviderDetail: {0} session files already use this provider
translations.codexSessions.providerBreakdownDescripti: Aligned by session files and local index records.
translations.codexSessions.status.migrated: Migrated {0} session files and {1} index entries.
translations.codexSessions.status.stateDbMissing: Codex local index database was not found; only session files are handled
translations.codexSessions.status.sqliteMissing: sqlite3 was not found, so the Codex local index could not be synced
translations.codexSessions.status.sqliteTimeout: Codex local index sync timed out
translations.codexSessions.status.failed: Failed to read or migrate sessions: {0}
translations.addProvider.title: Add new provider
translations.addProvider.description: Choose a built-in template or custom configuration, then manage and switch it on the right.
translations.addProvider.oauthTemplateHint: Codex OAuth is not shown in templates by default; use the dedicated login button in the top right.
translations.addProvider.apiKeyPlaceholder: Only fill this field; templates can fill the rest automatically
translations.addProvider.addedProvidersDescription: Switch the active provider here, or manage Codex OAuth accounts.
translations.codexAuthImport.title: Import Codex auth JSON
translations.codexAuthImport.description: Paste Codex auth.json or an OpenCowork account export. The accounts are added locally without opening a browser login.
translations.codexAuthImport.footer: Imported accounts appear under the Codex OAuth provider; use the refresh button on an account row to query 5h and 7d quota headers.
translations.settings.title: Settings
translations.settings.language.title: Language
translations.settings.language.description: Persist the UI language selection in the local config.
translations.settings.theme.title: Theme
translations.settings.desktop.title: Desktop behavior
translations.settings.desktop.description: Control startup behavior and the default app surface.
translations.settings.desktop.miniStatus: Show live mini window when closing main window
translations.settings.proxy.title: Local proxy
translations.settings.proxy.description: Codex clients connect to this local /v1 endpoint.
translations.settings.outboundProxy.title: Outbound proxy
translations.settings.outboundProxy.description: HTTP requests from CodexSwitch to upstream providers, OAuth, icons, and update checks use the system proxy by default.
translations.settings.outboundConnection.title: Outbound connection
translations.settings.outboundConnection.description: Control the HTTP protocol version and connection timeout used for upstream requests.
translations.settings.resilience.title: Upstream circuit breaker
translations.settings.resilience.description: Temporarily skip a provider after repeated upstream failures, then probe recovery with increasing delays.
translations.settings.auth.title: Authentication
translations.settings.auth.description: Protect the local inbound API with a shared key.
translations.settings.auth.preserveCodexAppAuth: Preserve Codex App ChatGPT login for plugins
translations.settings.auth.useFakeCodexAppAuth: Use fake Codex App auth for plugin testing
translations.settings.paths.title: Local paths
translations.settings.paths.description: These paths are managed by CodexSwitch.
translations.settings.notes.title: Notes
translations.settings.notes.description: Release and update behavior now follows the GitHub workflow.
translations.settings.notes.releaseWorkflow: Tagged CI runs create GitHub Releases and upload Native AOT installers.
translations.settings.usagePricing.title: Usage pricing
translations.settings.version.title: Version and updates
translations.settings.version.description: GitHub Release checks use the public AIDotNet/CodexSwitch repository.
translations.providers.title: Providers
translations.providers.description: Manage model providers, routing order, and account quota for the selected app.
translations.home.title: Home
translations.home.description: Monitor the local proxy, live usage, and provider routing from one workspace.
translations.home.providersDescription: Switch, reorder, and edit upstream providers.
translations.usage.title: Usage
translations.usage.logs.title: Request logs
translations.usage.logs.description: Filter local request records by time range, provider, and model.
translations.usage.description: View AI model usage and cost statistics
translations.usage.chart.empty: No usage records in this range
translations.models.title: Models
translations.models.description: Maintain model aliases, display icons, tiered pricing, and Claude cache creation billing.
translations.models.catalog.title: Local pricing catalog
translations.models.catalog.description: Request statistics estimate cost using these model rules.
translations.providerDialog.description: Configure the protocol, models, and billing strategy CodexSwitch uses to relay to upstream providers.
translations.providerDialog.name: Name
translations.providerDialog.routesDescription: Assign upstream models, protocols, and service tiers for individual models.
translations.providerDialog.conversionsDescription: Map inbound Codex model names to this provider's upstream models.
translations.providerDialog.footer: Saving immediately updates local config; the running service will use the latest routes.
translations.usageQuery.title: Usage query
translations.usageQuery.description: Fetch upstream remaining quota with a simple HTTP JSON request.
translations.usageQuery.addHint: Choose a template now; advanced request fields are available after editing the provider.
translations.modelDialog.description: Prices are calculated using the billing unit tokens setting; Claude cache creation tokens are billed separately.
translations.deleteModel.title: Delete model
translations.deleteModel.description: This removes the selected pricing rule from the local catalog.
translations.deleteProvider.title: Delete provider
translations.deleteProvider.description: Deleting removes this provider configuration and linked OAuth accounts. If it is active, CodexSwitch switches to the first available provider.
translations.claude.title: Claude Code
translations.claude.description: Claude Code providers write ~/.claude/settings.json and use the local /v1/messages endpoint.
translations.claude.providersDescription: Only providers enabled for Claude Code appear here.
translations.claude.settingsDescription: These values are written to Claude Code settings.json.
translations.status.startupUnsupported: Start with Windows is not supported on this system.
translations.status.providerDisabled: This channel is disabled and will not join request routing.
translations.status.oauthOpeningBrowser: Opening browser to complete Codex OAuth login...
translations.update.noRelease: No GitHub Release has been published yet.
translations.update.upToDate: This desktop build matches the latest published GitHub Release.
translations.update.available: A newer GitHub Release is available for download.
translations.update.noCompatibleInstaller: No compatible installer was found for this system.
